message:
Command `# 133 files with old PDK hash + 10 with old IP versions. Mass patch them all.
RUN_V3="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3"

# Patch all files in run dir
find "$RUN_V3" -type f \( -name "*.tcl" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.sdc" -o -name "*.v" -o -name "*.py" \) | \
    xargs sed -i \
        -e 's|8afc8346a57fe1ab7934ba5a6056ea8b43078e71|0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af|g' \
        -e 's|NC_XIP/v1\.6\.0|NC_XIP/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_AMBA/v1\.1\.0|NC_AMBA/v1.2.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_COMMON/v1\.6\.0|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_GPIO/v1\.6\.0|NC_GPIO/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.6\.0|NC_UART/v1.7.1|g' \
        -e 's|NC_SPI/v1\.6\.0|NC_SPI/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_I2C/v1\.6\.0|NC_I2C/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_TMR/v1\.6\.0|NC_TMR/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_PWM/v2\.6\.0|NC_PWM/v2.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_DMAC/v1\.6\.0|NC_DMAC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_CRC/v1\.6\.0|NC_CRC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_AES/v1\.6\.0|NC_AES/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_WWDT/v1\.6\.0|NC_WWDT/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_RTC/v1\.6\.0|NC_RTC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_SYSTICK/v1\.0\.0|NC_SYSTICK/v1.1.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_RV32/v1\.1\.0|NC_RV32/v1.1.1|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common/nc_fifo\.v|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/nc_fifo.v|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common/nc_glitch_filter\.v|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/nc_glitch_filter.v|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common/nc_ticker\.v|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/nc_ticker.v|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl|g' \
    2>/dev/null

echo "Text files patched."

# Also patch any .odb files we can - these are binary, but the _env.tcl handles PDK references
# The ODB files contain silicon geometry, not PDK paths - they're OK as-is

# Verify
remaining_old=$(grep -rl "8afc8346" "$RUN_V3" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
remaining_v16=$(grep -rl "v1\.6\.0" "$RUN_V3" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Remaining files with 8afc8346: $remaining_old"
echo "Remaining files with v1.6.0: $remaining_v16"` executed with exit code 0.

RUN_V3="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3"

find "$RUN_V3" -type f \( -name "*.tcl" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.sdc" -o -name "*.v" -o -name "*.py" \) | \

        -e 's|NC_XIP/v1\.6\.0|NC_XIP/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_AMBA/v1\.1\.0|NC_AMBA/v1.2.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_COMMON/v1\.6\.0|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_GPIO/v1\.6\.0|NC_GPIO/v1.7.0|g' \

        -e 's|NC_I2C/v1\.6\.0|NC_I2C/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_TMR/v1\.6\.0|NC_TMR/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_PWM/v2\.6\.0|NC_PWM/v2.7.0|g' \

        -e 's|NC_CRC/v1\.6\.0|NC_CRC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_AES/v1\.6\.0|NC_AES/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_WWDT/v1\.6\.0|NC_WWDT/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_RTC/v1\.6\.0|NC_RTC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_SYSTICK/v1\.0\.0|NC_SYSTICK/v1.1.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_RV32/v1\.1\.0|NC_RV32/v1.1.1|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common/nc_fifo\.v|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/nc_fifo.v|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common/nc_glitch_filter\.v|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/nc_glitch_filter.v|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common/nc_ticker\.v|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl/nc_ticker.v|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.7\.1/rtl/common|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0/rtl|g' \
    2>/dev/null

echo "Text files patched."

# Also patch any .odb files we can - these are binary, but the _env.tcl handles PDK references
# The ODB files contain silicon geometry, not PDK paths - they're OK as-is

# Verify
remaining_old=$(grep -rl "8afc8346" "$RUN_V3" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
remaining_v16=$(grep -rl "v1\.6\.0" "$RUN_V3" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Remaining files with 8afc8346: $remaining_old"
echo "Remaining files with v1.6.0: $remaining_v16""}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Text files patched.
Remaining files with 8afc8346: 48
Remaining files with v1.6.0: 4
